title: Department Manager Vacancy at Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
company: Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates:
Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates!
